overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny suburban Los Santos neighborhood lined with palm trees and single-family homes. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses a residential intersection, and passes pedestrians and vehicles in a continuous exploration sequence.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban residential sidewalk with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past trash bags and palm trees, approaching an intersection

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the residential street
single-story suburban home with brown roof and beige walls
black garbage bags piled next to a trash bin on the sidewalk
red and blue van parked on the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny suburban sidewalk lined with palm trees and single-family homes. Black trash bags sit near the curb on the left while a red van is parked across the street. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the character moves through the quiet residential area.

events.description: character stops at the corner and looks around before crossing
character steps onto the crosswalk and crosses the residential street

agents.ego_description: pausing at the corner, then crossing the street while a white car passes in the background

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving down the street past the intersection

entered.detail: residential street intersection with crosswalk markings
blue USPS-style mailbox on the corner

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a residential intersection and pauses before crossing the street. A white car passes by on the right as the character walks across the asphalt crosswalk toward a blue mailbox on the opposite corner. The open intersection provides clear views of houses on both sides of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban sidewalk with brick retaining walls

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing a female pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: low red brick wall with concrete cap running along the property line
yellow fire hydrant visible on the corner ahead
green manicured hedges behind the brick wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along a sidewalk bordered by a red brick retaining wall and green hedges on the right. A woman in a white dress walks past in the opposite direction. The street remains quiet with occasional cars passing by, and palm trees continue to line the residential route.

events.description: character passes a body lying on the sidewalk next to scattered papers

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk, passing a person lying on the ground without stopping

notable_agents.action: person lying face down on the sidewalk next to scattered papers

entered.detail: person lying on the concrete sidewalk with papers scattered nearby
blue postal mailbox on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a body lying on the sidewalk surrounded by scattered papers, continuing through the tree-lined residential area. The environment features well-maintained hedges, mailboxes, and single-family homes with palm trees casting shadows across the concrete path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny suburban neighborhood that transitions from a quiet residential stretch to a more detailed street scene. It begins by following the character along a sidewalk lined with palm trees and single-family homes, passing black trash bags and a parked red van. As the character reaches a residential intersection, the view opens up to show houses on both sides while they cross the asphalt toward a blue mailbox as a white car passes by. The scene then shifts to a path bordered by a red brick retaining wall and green hedges, where the character brushes past a woman in a white dress. Finally, the camera continues forward past a body lying on the sidewalk surrounded by scattered papers, moving deeper into the tree-lined area where palm trees cast long shadows across the concrete.
